narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula 3-C (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 347 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 15.6 percentage points.
